query: 3d isometric icon of business data strategy document, blue and orange color scheme, high quality, transparent background

llm_score.explanation: The image is an excellent match for the search query and prompt. It features a professional 3D isometric design of a business document with data visualization (upward arrow/chart), a target representing strategy, and a notification bell. The quality is high, and there are no watermarks. While the prompt mentioned a blue and orange scheme, the red and gold accents work well with the primary blue base.
llm_score.caption: A high-quality 3D isometric icon featuring a blue clipboard with a data growth chart, a red bullseye target with two arrows, and a golden notification bell, representing business strategy and performance tracking.

query: 3d isometric icon of business data strategy document, blue and orange color scheme, high quality, transparent background

llm_score.explanation: The image accurately depicts a 3D business document (clipboard with checklist) and a briefcase, fitting the general search query. llm_score.caption: A high-quality 3D icon set featuring a brown leather briefcase in front of a clipboard with a checklist and a yellow pencil, designed with soft shadows on a white background.
